CREATE TABLE connections (id INT, username VARCHAR(255));
SELECT * FROM connections WHERE username LIKE 'username1';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM connections WHERE username LIKE 'username2';
SELECT DISTINCT username FROM connections WHERE username LIKE 'username%';
SELECT username, COUNT(*) FROM connections GROUP BY username HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT * FROM connections WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM connections c WHERE c.username = connections.username);
SELECT * FROM connections WHERE username IN (SELECT username FROM connections WHERE id < 4);
SELECT username FROM connections WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM connections WHERE username LIKE 'username%');
SELECT * FROM connections WHERE username IN (SELECT username FROM (SELECT username FROM connections) AS sub);
SELECT * FROM connections WHERE username LIKE (SELECT CONCAT('username', '1'));
SELECT username FROM connections WHERE username LIKE ALL (SELECT username FROM connections WHERE id < 3);
SELECT username FROM connections ORDER BY username LIMIT 5;
